description:
Introductions:
If you have a propensity to collect watch, and you've already possessed various watches, how to arrange those gadgets? To well classify those watch and keep them in order, this 20 Compartments Dual Layers Elegant Wooden Watch Collection Box is really an ideal choice. It is particularly designed into 20 compartments for recognizing your watch. High-class wooden material makes this box durable, comfortable and decent as well. With opening style, it is quite easy to operate. This watch box is in so compact size that won't take up much room. Portable and practical!

Features:
1. Slim and cute size, portable and practical
2. Made of high-grade material and with exquisite craftsmanship, durable and stylish
3. Divided into 20 compartments for well recognizing your messy watches
4. Keep watches in order and prevent them from missing
5. Opening style, easy for operation
6. Compact size won't occupy much space

Specifications:
1. Color: Black
2. Material: PU Leather (Surface) Wood Pearl Fleece Lining (Inside)

3. Dimensions: (11.02 x 7.87 x 6.50)" / (28 x 20 x 16.5)cm (L x W x H)
4. Weight: 67.94oz / 1926g

 

Package Includes:
1 x Collection Box
1 x Key
